verses.text: Tua ciangin Moab zanglei panin Jerikho gal Nebo Mual, Pisgah dawnah Moses paito hi. Tua ciangin Topa in gam khempeuh, Gilead gam pan Dan ciangdong
Naftali gam khempeuh, Efraim leh Manasseh gam, Judah gam khempeuh Nitumna Tuipi dong
Negeb gam, leh nisuh kung khuapi kuam a kici Jerikho panin Zoar ciangdong a kikhung zanglei a lak hi

Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Hih gam, Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob tungah kiciamin, ‘Na suanlekhakte uh tungah ka pia ding hi,’ ka cih leitang ahi hi. Na mit tawh nang kong musak khin a, ahih hangin tua lai-ah nang na pai kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa' thugenna bangin Topa' nasem Moses pen Moab gamah si a
Bethpeor galkhat, Moab gam kuamah amah kiphum hi. Ahih hangin tuhun dongin a kiphumna mun kuamah in theilo hi
Moses a sihin kum za leh kum sawmnih pha hi. A mit maanglo a, a tha ngeina zong kiamlo hi
Moab zanglei-ah Israel mite ni sawmthum sung Moses hangin a kah khit uh ciangin Moses hangin kahna leh thumna a veng ta hi

Tua ciangin Moses in, ama tungah a khut nga khin ahih manin Nun tapa Joshua lungsim pilna tawh a kidim hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite in ama thu mangin, Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin a gamta uh hi
Israel mite sungah Moses bangin Topa in maitang kimu-in a theih kamsang dang kuamah omlo hi
Egypt gam sungah Faro leh a nasemte leh a gam khempeuhah a hih dingin Topa in ama tungah a piak limte leh na lamdangte khempeuh a nei kuamah dang omlo hi
Israel-te khempeuh muhna-ah Moses in a hih a lian vangliatna leh a lauhuaite khempeuh a hih thei, amah tawh a kibang kuamah dang omlo hi.
